steps.title: Use the colon clue
steps.content: The colon introduces the explanation for Ortega's body of work: he showed a diverse range of musical talents, from orchestral pieces and operas to film scores. The blank needs a word meaning diverse or wide-ranging.

steps.title: Select the diversity word
steps.content: Choice A means no longer current, Choice B describes loneliness, and Choice C means no longer remembered; none fits the positive description of diverse work. The matching word means having many different types. The answer is D.
